cycle.mission_text_summary: HEXA-WEAVE MVP W4 OpenFold sandbox dry-run spec authoring. W3-spec carry-through; sandbox-construction plan + dry-run sanity-check sequence + pitfall+fallback matrix + multi-strand insertion-line discovery procedure. No clone / pip / weight download / nvidia-smi executed.

cause_chain: predecessor closure cycle exhibited 3 orthogonal kick failure modes (OAuth-401, slot-saturated, container-no-node)
F-CL3-a falsifier (kick infra clean run within 24h, deadline 2026-04-29) not yet observed at W4-prep authoring time
W3 used raw 100 fallback; W4 prep continues fallback for consistency until F-CL3-a flips
kick_infra_status.raw_91_c3_disclosure: W4 prep deliverable produced via in-context synthesis (raw 100 fallback). Real nexus kick deferred to W4-execution turn contingent on F-CL3-a observation by 2026-04-29.

steps: STEP 2: python3.10 -m venv ~/core/hexa-weave/venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
STEP 3: pip install torch==2.5.1+cu124 torchvision==0.20.1+cu124 --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu124
STEP 4: git clone --depth 1 --branch v2.2.0 https://github.com/aqlaboratory/openfold.git ~/core/hexa-weave/openfold (verify HEAD == e938c184a291bf053af3b14c1e3e8bb29aee57e2)

STEP 5: pip install --no-deps 'numpy<2.0' (BEFORE openfold reqs) && pip install -r openfold/requirements.txt && pip install pydantic==2.* biopython==1.84 biotite==1.0.* rdkit-pypi==2024.3.* einops==0.7.* ml_collections==0.1.1 dm-tree==0.1.8
STEP 7 import test: python -c 'import openfold' (expect rc=0)
STEP 8 small protein FASTA + reference PDB stage: curl https://www.rcsb.org/fasta/entry/6L1U + curl https://files.rcsb.org/download/6L1U.pdb

STEP 9 dry-run forward pass: PYTHONHASHSEED=42 python run_pretrained_openfold.py --fasta_paths 6L1U.fasta --use_single_seq_inference --jax_param_path weights/params/params_model_1.pkl --model_device cuda:0 --bf16 --output_dir outputs/

mac_m2_vs_ubu1_dispatch.STEP_9_forward: Mac M2 DEFER (no CUDA) / ubu1 ALLOWED

w3_steps_already_covered_by_w4_2_3: W3 §3.2 STEP 1 nvidia-smi pre-flight: covered by W4 §2.1 STEP 0
W3 §3.2 STEP 2 6L1U FASTA + ref PDB: covered by W4 §3 STEP 8
W3 §3.2 STEP 3 MSA precompute (skipped via single-seq): covered by W4 §3 STEP 9
w3_steps_net_new_in_w4_3: W3 §3.2 STEP 5 forward pass with poller running (re-run of W4 §3 STEP 9)
W3 §3.2 STEP 6 kill poller + awk peak_vram_mb
W3 §3.2 STEP 7 BioPython parse output PDB
W3 §3.2 STEP 8 RMSD vs ref via Bio.PDB.Superimposer (Cα-only)
fallback_chain_carry_w3_3_4: 7f: bf16 → fp16 (slight accuracy loss, large memory drop)
7g: declare F-W1-1 + F-W3-4 falsified → escalate to RoseTTAFold All-Atom
vram_measurement_integration.execution_status: NOT_EXECUTED — requires user approval; sandbox cannot SSH ubu1

primary_pitfalls.surface: RTX 5070 sm_120 prebuilt cuda kernels absent in OpenFold deepspeed_evoformer_attention
primary_pitfalls.detection: kernel image is not for this GPU OR no kernel image is available for execution on the device
primary_pitfalls.mitigation: source-compile: pip uninstall deepspeed && CUDA_ARCH_LIST='8.6;9.0;12.0' DS_BUILD_OPS=1 DS_BUILD_EVOFORMER_ATTN=1 pip install --no-binary deepspeed deepspeed==0.15.4

primary_pitfalls.surface: NumPy 2.0 ABI break — pre-NumPy-2.0 wheels segfault when paired with NumPy 2.x
primary_pitfalls.detection: ImportError or segfault during import openfold.model OR 'module compiled against NumPy 1.x...'
primary_pitfalls.mitigation: hard-pin numpy<2.0 BEFORE openfold reqs (W4 §2.2 STEP 5 already does)

primary_pitfalls.surface: torch 2.5 vs OpenFold v2.2.0 upper bound — v2.2.0 may pin torch<2.0
primary_pitfalls.mitigation: fallback A: pin OpenFold main HEAD be2ec184... (W3 §2.2 alternate); fallback B: torch 2.4.0+cu121

primary_pitfalls.surface: OOM during forward pass on 12 GB VRAM

raw_91_c3_limits: no source-compile attempted; sm_120 fix is theoretical (F-W3-4 + F-W4-4 retire)
no main HEAD re-clone executed (fallback A theoretical)

multi_strand_insertion_plan.carry_w3_4_2_decision: late-fusion: 18 cross-attn modules at evoformer blocks 43-48 (last 6 of 48); RNA + ligand encoders independent; joint structure module at end
insertion_line_discovery_procedure: after W4 §2 STEP 4 clone: grep -n 'class EvoformerStack' openfold/model/evoformer.py (record EVOFORMER_STACK_DEFLINE)
insertion target: BETWEEN EvoformerStack last block call and StructureModule first call, inside AlphaFold.forward(). Pair-tensor variable likely named 'z' per AF2 conv.

openfold_api_surface_carry_w3_4_3.invasiveness: non-invasive if forward() exposes start_block/end_block kwarg; runtime monkey-patch otherwise

openfold_api_surface_carry_w3_4_3.surface: Pair embedding (B, N_res, N_res, 128) accessible at block boundary
StructureModule.forward(pair, msa, ...) extension to accept r_emb + l_emb queries
openfold_api_surface_carry_w3_4_3.invasiveness: necessarily invasive (subclass + override; bounded — no source patches)

raw_91_c3_limits: no actual line numbers captured (post-clone only)
module-layout assumption based on AF2 lineage canonical form (F-W3-1, F-W3-5, F-W4-5)
EvoformerStack block-range API existence assumed; runtime monkey-patch is bounded fallback
LoC margin is zero — no slack for unexpected boilerplate

hooks_with_invasive_fallback: N6-H2 (only invasive if pair-track read needed)
